subject: Runtime Semantic Graph Final Acceptance Standard

acceptance_criteria.title: Body truly runtimeized
checks: Body supports live update from sensor/mobile/BIM/manual sources
Body supports rollback and replay for runtime events
Body timeline is queryable with event_id/operator/timestamp
Body update produces downstream impact signal
evidence: Runtime events include slotKey + source + operator

acceptance_criteria.title: Gate truly real-time executable
checks: Gate executes on live body update without manual batch-only trigger
Failed gate appears in live failed-gate stream
Gate override is tracked with reviewer identity and reason
Gate execution emits runtime trace and audit record
evidence: API: /api/v1/gate/evaluate or live runtime worker processing
Live Runtime Center shows live failed gates

acceptance_criteria.title: Proof forms immutable chain
checks: Each runtime execution generates proof artifact
Proof contains previousProofId/proofHash lineage link
Proof chain supports audit export and replay verification
Proof mutation is append-only (no in-place overwrite of history)
evidence: Proof includes chain link fields and signatures

acceptance_criteria.title: Conclusion live aggregation
checks: Conclusion refreshes after proof/gate update
Conclusion stream reflects PASS/FAIL/REVIEW_REQUIRED in near real-time
Aggregation supports project/form scope
Conclusion refresh is traceable to source events
evidence: API: /api/v1/live-conclusion/* or live runtime snapshot conclusion stream

acceptance_criteria.title: Dependency auto linkage
checks: Body change auto-resolves affected Gates/Proofs/Conclusions
Gate change invalidates dependent proofs
Proof change refreshes dependent conclusions
Engine supports incremental + lazy recompute + cycle prevention

acceptance_criteria.title: Replay supports isolated versioned rerun
checks: Historical body_snapshot can replay under old/new rulepack
Replay returns old_result/new_result/diff/affected_gates/changed_conclusions
Replay generates ReplayProof
Replay does not pollute live runtime state

acceptance_criteria.title: Trust is computable
checks: Trust score includes calibration/signature/proof completeness/override frequency/anomaly
Trust level classifies trusted/review_required/suspicious/untrusted
Untrusted blocks auto final compliance
Dashboard exposes low trust proofs/suspicious overrides/missing evidence

acceptance_criteria.title: Runtime supports real-time event streaming
checks: Supports sensor/mobile/BIM/manual_override ingest
Supports async queue + worker drain processing
Provides active runtime events/live failed gates/current risk/proof stream
Supports replay/rollback/audit/traceability over event stream

acceptance_criteria.title: All runtime results traceable: Body -> Gate -> Proof -> SpecIR -> normRef
checks: Every conclusion can resolve originating proof_id/event_id
Proof links to rule_id/rule_version/specir context and normdoc/normRef identifiers
Gate decision trace links to body snapshot and slotKey
Trace query can reconstruct full chain without manual data stitching
evidence: Proof fields: rule_id, rule_version, normdoc_id, clause_id, inputs_hash, decision_trace
Trace endpoints: runtime traceability + proof replay/audit

acceptance_execution_protocol.pass_rule: criterion passes only if all checks in criterion are true
acceptance_execution_protocol.final_status_rule: highest status whose min_score and must_pass_for conditions are both satisfied
